TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marcus_Banks, title = Marcus_Banks, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marcus_Banks} }

S.FORM: Marcus Banks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Marcus Banks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Marcus Banks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Marcus Banks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: marʦ~ʨus~ɕ βanks~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, marʦ~ʨus~ɕ βanks~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
